newValue.text: Archive day entry screen/state described (what the player sees before starting)
Streak-repair success moment specced (copy + visual direction)
Differences from normal mission-complete are clearly defined

snapshot.title: Design streak-repair / archive day visual flow
snapshot.description: Players can repair broken streaks by accessing archive days. This is a meaningful moment — a second chance — but currently has no celebratory or explanatory visual design. Spec the flow: what appears when entering an archive day (explanation/context), what plays when the repair is successful, and how it differs from a normal mission-complete. The archive access and streak-repair mechanics are already implemented; this unblocks a visual polish pass.
